summary: Comprehensive testing of AgriBooks Branch Transfer repack pricing feature. Found and fixed 3 backend bugs. All 17 backend tests pass. Frontend repack sub-row and incoming preview working correctly. Identified 1 minor frontend display issue.

bugs_fixed.bug: CRITICAL: Duplicate PUT route defined at line 224 and line 326. The first PUT at line 224 was missing 'repack_price_updates' from the update dict. Since FastAPI uses the first-defined route, the second PUT (which had repack_price_updates) was dead code. Result: PUT updates to repack_price_updates were silently ignored.
bugs_fixed.fix: Added 'repack_price_updates': data.get('repack_price_updates', order.get('repack_price_updates', [])) to the first PUT's update dict. Removed the duplicate second PUT route entirely.

bugs_fixed.bug: CRITICAL: receive_transfer had 'qty_overrides = {item[product_id]: float(item.get(qty_received, item[qty])) for item in data.get(items, [])}'. Python evaluates all arguments before calling .get(), so item['qty'] was always evaluated even when 'qty_received' was present. Since the receive request body items only send {product_id, qty_received} without 'qty', this raised KeyError: 'qty' causing all receive calls to return 500.
bugs_fixed.fix: Replaced the dict comprehension with a safe loop: for each item, use item.get('qty_received') if present, else item.get('qty', 0).

bugs_fixed.bug: MINOR: In _apply_receipt(), the check 'if not repack_id or new_price is None: continue' was not guarding against new_price=0. A repack update with new_retail_price=0 was being applied and written to branch_prices with retail=0.0, which is wrong. Design spec says 'Only entries with new_retail_price > 0 are applied'.
bugs_fixed.fix: Added 'if new_price <= 0: continue' after converting new_price to float.

design_issues.screen: Incoming Transfer Preview - Price Updates on Receive
issues: The old (current) repack price shows '—' with strikethrough instead of the actual current destination price (e.g., ₱9.00). The frontend code at line 1517 renders rpu.current_dest_retail but this field is NOT included in the repack_price_updates payload when creating the transfer (handleSubmit, line 327-335). Fix: add 'current_dest_retail: rp.current_dest_retail' to the repack_price_updates.push() in handleSubmit.

features_tested_status.product_lookup_returns_repacks: PASS — GET /api/branch-transfers/product-lookup returns 'repacks' array for products with repack children
features_tested_status.repack_fields_correct: PASS — id, name, units_per_parent, capital_per_repack, current_dest_retail all present in each repack
features_tested_status.repack_capital_computation: PASS — capital_per_repack = branch_capital / units_per_parent computed correctly (3.5 = 70/20)
features_tested_status.repack_current_dest_retail: PASS — current_dest_retail fetched from destination branch_prices or falls back to global
features_tested_status.create_transfer_with_repack_updates: PASS — POST /api/branch-transfers creates with repack_price_updates field stored
features_tested_status.receive_applies_repack_prices: PASS (after fix) — POST /api/branch-transfers/{id}/receive applies repack price updates to destination branch_prices
features_tested_status.receive_response_repack_prices_applied: PASS — response includes 'repack_prices_applied' list with repack_id, repack_name, new_retail_price
features_tested_status.blank_repack_price_no_change: PASS — empty repack_price_updates => repack_prices_applied is empty, destination prices unchanged
features_tested_status.zero_price_not_applied: PASS (after fix) — new_retail_price=0 not applied (only > 0 are applied)
features_tested_status.repack_subrow_shows_in_form: PASS — Form shows blue repack sub-row when product with repacks is selected
features_tested_status.repack_subrow_new_price_input: PASS — New price input with data-testid='repack-price-{id}' is interactive
features_tested_status.repack_subrow_profit_indicator: PASS — Shows +₱21.50 profit indicator when new price (25.00) > capital (3.50)
features_tested_status.repack_subrow_leave_blank_hint: PASS — 'Leave blank to keep current price' hint shown
features_tested_status.incoming_preview_price_updates: PASS — 'Price Updates on Receive' section shown in incoming view when repack_price_updates exist
features_tested_status.incoming_preview_shows_repack_name: PASS — Shows 'R VITMIN PRO POWDER (1 X 20)' in preview
features_tested_status.incoming_preview_old_price_strikethrough: MINOR ISSUE — Shows '—' instead of current price (₱9.00) with strikethrough because current_dest_retail not stored in payload

action_items: FRONTEND FIX (minor): In BranchTransferPage.js handleSubmit() repack_price_updates.push() (line ~327), add 'current_dest_retail: rp.current_dest_retail' to store the old price. This enables the incoming preview to show '₱9.00 → ₱25' with strikethrough instead of '— → ₱25'.
critical_code_review_comments: branch_transfers.py had duplicate PUT /{transfer_id} routes (lines 224 and 326). FastAPI silently uses the first. The first was missing repack_price_updates — so all PUT updates to repack prices were lost. Fixed.
receive_transfer: dict comprehension evaluated item['qty'] eagerly (Python arg evaluation) causing KeyError for all receive calls. Fixed with safe conditional loop.
_apply_receipt: new_price=0 guard was missing (only checking None). Fixed with <= 0 check per spec.
BranchTransferPage.js: current_dest_retail not stored in repack_price_updates payload, so incoming preview shows '—' instead of old price. Minor fix needed.

success_rate.frontend: 95% — all UI features work, minor display issue with old price in incoming preview

seed_data_creation: Multiple test branch transfers created: BTO-20260224-0010 through BTO-20260224-0026 (Main Branch → IPIL BRANCH). BTO-20260224-0026 is 'sent' with repack_price_updates=[{repack_id: d3bb5438-900e-4a3e-a08a-90147b8b7190, repack_name: R VITMIN PRO POWDER (1 X 20), new_retail_price: 25}].
context_for_next_testing_agent: 3 backend bugs were fixed in this iteration: (1) Duplicate PUT route - first PUT now includes repack_price_updates. (2) KeyError 'qty' in receive_transfer fixed with safe conditional. (3) Zero price check added. Frontend repack sub-row and incoming preview work correctly. Only remaining item: add current_dest_retail to repack_price_updates push in handleSubmit (BranchTransferPage.js ~line 327). After fix, verify incoming preview shows old price with strikethrough. BTO-20260224-0026 is currently 'sent' in IPIL BRANCH incoming queue for testing confirmation flow.

rca_of_issues.bug1_duplicate_put_missing_repack_update: Root cause: Two separate developers or iterations added two PUT /{transfer_id} routes. The first implementation (line 224) was an enhanced version with role-checking and branch isolation but was created before repack_price_updates feature was added. The second implementation (line 326) was added for repack support but FastAPI uses the first-defined route, making the second dead code. Fix: Merged repack_price_updates into the first route and removed duplicate.
rca_of_issues.bug2_keyerror_qty_in_receive: Root cause: The qty_overrides dict comprehension used item.get('qty_received', item['qty']). In Python, default argument expressions are evaluated eagerly, so item['qty'] was always executed even when 'qty_received' was present. Since the receive request body items only included {product_id, qty_received}, item['qty'] raised KeyError. This caused 100% failure of all receive API calls.
rca_of_issues.bug3_zero_price_applied: Root cause: The guard in _apply_receipt was 'if not repack_id or new_price is None: continue'. This only skips None values but not 0. The design spec states 'Only entries with new_retail_price > 0 are applied', so 0 should also be skipped. Added 'if new_price <= 0: continue' after the float conversion.
